description: Explicit CUSTOMER 'satisfied incumbent' signals — the current solution MEETS its targets and there is NO active buying motion. When a call pairs strong satisfaction (metrics inside thresholds / no gap that justifies change) with an explicit no-motion statement (no requisition/RFP/project, not comparing products, not starting a modernization), it is NOT a pursuable opportunity even if positive metrics are stated (a healthy metric must never be misread as pain). Generic linguistic shapes only — never a company/product/scenario literal. Logic: src/lib/signal-agent/satisfactionGuard.ts. This is DISTINCT from a scope constraint on a real, painful opportunity ('keep the incumbent tool' alongside a stated gap), which must NOT suppress.
